codeReview.summary: Reviewed the current branch state, feature handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit `80a94959b2c822cd9cecb3360c65e50d10350fd5`. The extracted tool-executor/orchestrator modules look behavior-preserving, but the reviewed feature is not acceptable as shipped because the commit bundled unrelated release-metadata version bumps into the root package and both extension manifests.

issues.description: Commit `80a94959b2c822cd9cecb3360c65e50d10350fd5` bumps the root package version from `0.4.61` to `0.4.62`, which is outside the scope of this non-release tool-executor refactor and violates the mission guardrail against bundling version bumps with refactoring work.

The same feature commit also bumps the Chrome extension manifest version from `0.4.61` to `0.4.62`, widening scope beyond the tool execution pipeline refactor and changing release metadata without feature justification.

The Firefox manifest version is bumped in the same refactor commit even though the feature only targets `tool-executor-subagent-runner.ts` and related tool modules; this release-metadata change should have been excluded or isolated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `refactor-worker` completion gate is still not being enforced reliably. This worker reported `followedProcedure: true` even though the recorded session does not show the skill-required lint step or final diff review, which made it easy for the forbidden package/manifest version bumps in this commit to slip through.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `.factory/skills/refactor-worker/SKILL.md:100-111` requires `npm run lint`, `git diff --cached --stat`, and `git diff --stat`; a transcript check for worker session `3c8887b4-972d-4f14-9329-53a8c66c9a73` found `npm run lint: False`, `git diff --cached --stat: False`, and `git diff --stat: False`, while `/Users/sero/.factory/missions/fdd24bf3-fc74-45b3-a646-4179615c1e31/handoffs/2026-03-11T10-00-39-895Z__extension-refactor-tool-executor__3c8887b4-972d-4f14-9329-53a8c66c9a73.json:52-55` still sets `followedProcedure` to true.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, mission guidance, and commit `80a94959b2c822cd9cecb3360c65e50d10350fd5`. The refactor itself looks structurally sound, but the review fails because the commit bundled three out-of-scope version bumps into `package.json` and both extension manifests.
